Introduction.Project Purpose: Why the project exists and its intended outcome.
Introduction.Project Objectives: Goals the project aims to achieve.
Introduction.Project Stakeholders: Key individuals or groups involved in or affected by the project.
Introduction.Assumptions: Conditions assumed to be true for the purpose of this document.
